nasb.text: For they invited the people to the sacrifices of their gods, and the people ate and bowed down to their gods.

esv.text: These invited the people to the sacrifices of their gods, and the people ate and bowed down to their gods.

cnv.text: 那些女子叫以色列人來，一同給她們的神獻祭，以色列人也吃了她們的祭物，跪拜她們的神。

ccb.text: 那些女子邀他们参加祭祀，他们吃了祭物，并跪拜她们的神明，
